content.en:
"What treasure?"

Ye Tian was a little curious.

"The Primordial Ancient Liquid from the Primordial Ancient River!" Xuanqing Dao Ancestor introduced, "The Primordial Ancient Liquid can greatly improve the cultivation of the Dao Ancestor, and it is even useful to us half-step sevenfold Primordial Ancestors. However, the Primordial Ancient River is very powerful, and it is very difficult to kill, this is a Primordial Ancient Artifact that is even more difficult than the Primordial Ancients!"

"Where is the primordial ancient river?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Truncate Montenegro. Xuanqing Dao Ancestor waved his hand, cutting off an area of the Black Mountain and displaying, "There is the Primordial Ancient River here, and there is more than one, the strength of any Primordial Ancient River has the realm of the peak of the sixfold Primordial Ancestor, and there is also a half-step Sevenfold Primordial Ancient River at the level of the Primordial Ancient River." The biggest feature of the Primordial Ancient River is that it is bound, once it is bound by the Primordial Ancient River, it is difficult for even a half-step sevenfold original ancestor to escape. Therefore, even we, the half-step sevenfold ancestors, would not dare to provoke such a primordial artifact as the Primordial Ancient River!"

"Thank you Xuanqing Dao Ancestor for your advice. "

Ye Tian thanked.

Xuanqing Dao Ancestor said again: "Endless Origin Ancestor, I told you, but you don't want to provoke those Primordial Ancient Rivers, you cultivate slowly, and your cultivation will still be promoted to the peak of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, there is no need to rush to break through!

"I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

He didn't explain too much, these Dao Ancestors didn't dare to provoke the Primordial Ancient River, because once it fell, it really fell.

However, he has several replicas, one of which can be recreated, so he has no worries about his safety.

However, it was impossible for him to reveal his situation to these Dao Ancestors.

After a period of time, many Taoist ancestors ended their discussions and left one by one.

......

Truncate Montenegro.

Ye Tian came here, and according to the location given by Xuanqing Dao Ancestor, he found the location of the area where the Primordial Ancient River was located.

"According to the instructions of Xuanqing Dao Ancestor, the Primordial Ancient River is here, and it is best to kill a Primordial Ancient River this time!"

Ye Tian was not prepared to deal with the Primordial Ancient River that was comparable to the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, it was too difficult to kill, he was ready to kill the Primordial Ancient River that was comparable to the peak of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor.

Soon, Ye Tian entered this section of the truncated Black Mountain.

Airplanes!

The copy talent probed around, and it didn't take long for him to sense the talent of a primordial ancient river, so as to determine the location of the other party.

"It's a primordial ancient river comparable to the half-step sevenfold ancestor level, it's hard to kill, give up!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He wanted to bypass and look for other Primordial Ancient Rivers, but he soon encountered two more Primordial Ancient Rivers comparable to the half-step Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor level.

In a short time, some primordial ancient rivers surrounded him.

The Primordial River is similar to a river, and these Primordial Rivers can also be stacked together to form an incomparably vast river.

Soon, Ye Tian was trapped by the Primordial Ancient Rivers, his body seemed to be trapped in the Primordial Ancient Rivers, and the surrounding time and space were blocked and suppressed.

Ye Tian went all out, and finally used the Endless Yuan Dao to cooperate with the Endless Golden Light to penetrate these Primordial Ancient Rivers, but he was blocked by other Primordial Ancient Rivers.

In the end, Ye Tian's copy body was besieged and killed.

......

"No wonder those Dao Ancestors didn't dare to fight these Primordial Ancient River ideas, even I was besieged and killed, and the other half-step Sevenfold Primordial Ancestors, if they enter there, they will almost definitely die!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, he actually had a hope of escaping, and as long as he continued to use the Primordial Ancient Bead to save his life, there was hope to break out of the layers of encirclement.

However, this time he was just a temptation, and he didn't carry a Primordial Ancient Pearl, and it didn't matter, even if a copy body fell, it wouldn't be a big deal.

In the following years, Ye Tian tried a few more times to determine the situation there.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian locked on to a Primordial Ancient River at the peak level of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor at an extremely fast speed, and quickly came to its side.

"Die!"

Ye Tian cast an endless golden light and hit it with one blow.

Rumble!!!!

The body of this primordial ancient river was directly shattered, and it was killed by Ye Tian in one blow.

And in the shattered body, a primordial ancient liquid emerged, taking on a gray color.

Ye Tianyi grabbed this primordial ancient liquid, and then rushed out of the encirclement as fast as he could.

After a period of time, Ye Tian got rid of these primordial ancient rivers and fled into the Silent Black Sea, and then escaped into a district boundary, so that he was safe.

And it was in this area that Ye Tian refined this primordial ancient liquid and tried the effect of this primordial ancient liquid.

Rumble!!!

The incomparably pure and powerful energy quickly refined Ye Tian's Dao Fruit and body, and quickly improved his cultivation.

After a long time, this primordial ancient liquid was finally exhausted.

"The effect is not bad, if I can get ten copies, I can raise my cultivation to the peak realm of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

And for him, it was not too difficult to collect ten primordial ancient liquids.

In the following years, Ye Tian tried to hunt the Primordial Ancient River of the Sixfold Peak Ancestor level again and again, and although he often failed, the loss was not too great.

Time flies.

In the blink of an eye, eight million years of the Primordial Era had passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already gathered nine parts of the primordial ancient liquid, and all of them had been absorbed and refined, and his current cultivation was infinitely close to the peak realm of the sixfold primordial ancestor.

"With one more primordial ancient liquid, I can break through to the peak realm of the sixfold primordial ancestor!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After joining the cultivation breakthrough, his strength will skyrocket, and it will be even easier to hunt these primordial ancient liquids at that time!

Even when the time comes, he will have the hope of killing the Primordial Ancient River, which is comparable to the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor.

this day.

Ye Tian once again entered the Truncated Black Mountain area where the Primordial Ancient River was located, and this time he even prepared a lot of Primordial Ancient Beads, just to seize this Primordial Ancient Liquid.

Thundered!!!

After fighting again and again, Ye Tian successfully killed a primordial ancient river that was comparable to the peak of the sixfold primordial ancestor, seized its primordial ancient liquid, and then began to flee.

Just after escaping the Truncated Mountain Range, something suddenly happened.

Rumble!!!!

The entire Truncated Mountain Range began to vibrate, and countless black figures poured out from the Truncated Black Mountain.

Seeing this scene, Ye Tian suddenly realized that something was wrong.

"Oh no, it's an antiquity riot!"

Ye Tian knew very well what the antiquities turmoil represented, this was a myriad of primordial antiquities sweeping this area, at this time, he must not go to the Silent Black Sea, otherwise he would definitely die.

And some special primordial antiquities can even break into the boundaries of the district.

Of course, that kind of primordial artifact is rare, but it exists!

"Enter the nearest sector first!"

Ye Tian decided.

At the same time, he summoned the other Dao Ancestors, spreading the news of the antiquity turmoil.
